prerequisites.value: Bludgeoner, Cudgeler Style, base attack bonus +5 or monk level 5th.

description.value: **Benefit:** When you hit with a charge attack using the Cudgeler Style feat, you can immediately attempt a single trip combat maneuver check against the target with a +2 competence bonus as a free action. This provokes an attack of opportunity as normal for a trip combat maneuver.
